description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a facade of brownish brickwork and concrete bands separating the floors. The upper story has several large, dark-tinted rectangular windows, some of which appear weathered or dirty, while the lower story includes a main entry door and a smaller window. The front of the house is marked by a prominent horizontal light fixture above the main window, and the entryway is recessed, providing a small sheltered area. The roof is flat and open, bordered by brick parapet walls, suggesting a utilitarian or modernist design. The overall appearance is robust and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on durability.
description: A two-story urban house with brick and concrete exterior, large dark windows, and a flat open roof. The design is utilitarian with a recessed entryway and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, a large window, a horizontal light fixture, and a recessed entryway.
description_view_1: Side/rear view with two large upper-story windows and no visible entry, highlighting the brick and concrete banding.
description_view_2: Back view with a solid brick wall and no windows or doors, emphasizing the building's robust construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two large upper-story windows and no entry, similar to view 1 but mirrored.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a single door, small overhang, and a horizontal light fixture above the main window
